name: phasekit
description: OpenCode-first planning and execution plugin with a harness-agnostic core.

scripts.build: bunx tsup packages/core/src/index.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir packages/core/dist && bunx tsup packages/opencode/src/adapter.ts packages/opencode/src/plugin.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir packages/opencode/dist && bunx tsup packages/install/src/index.ts packages/install/src/cli.ts --format esm --dts --clean --out-dir packages/install/dist
